workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed this workflow's workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
Validation methodology is a critical control: reviews should not rely on tests alone.

step.goal: Assess readiness and existing validation state
step.action: Run `td usage --new-session` if needed, otherwise `td usage -q`
Inspect {architecture_file} if present to infer stack and runtime components
Detect available project verification commands (tests, lint, typecheck, build, smoke/integration)

step.goal: Build or update validation methodology config
step.action: Populate command gates with discovered project commands and deterministic pass criteria
Define mandatory review evidence requirements (command outputs, changed files, risk notes)
Define fallback policy when a gate is unavailable (for example: mark as skipped with rationale and compensating checks)
Prefer defaults and ask only when a missing decision changes review rigor materially
Create or update a td task dedicated to validation methodology maintenance when one does not exist
Add dependencies so critical review tasks can reference the validation methodology task when appropriate
Record location of {validation_methodology_file} in task metadata or handoff notes
Run configured gates that are executable in current context and capture baseline results
Report configured mandatory gates, optional gates, fallback policy, and current baseline pass/fail status
step.output: Validation methodology configured. `next-step` reviews and implementations must use this file as a critical verification gate.
